eyebrow.zh: Windows 桌面软件 · 开源 MIT · 自带 API key
eyebrow.en: Windows desktop apps · open source MIT · bring your own API key

headline.zh:
没 API 的老 Windows 软件
让 LLM 一句话替你点
headline.en:
Legacy Windows apps with no API,
driven by an LLM in one sentence

sub.zh: 政企、医疗、制造业还在跑 2008 年的桌面软件——没 API、没 SDK，只能靠人手点鼠标。一句话下达目标，它自己看着界面、点按钮、填表单、存文件，把没人愿意改的老古董软件驱动起来。
sub.en: State-owned, hospital, and factory floors still run 2008-era desktop software — no API, no SDK, just humans clicking. State the goal in one sentence; it watches the screen, clicks buttons, fills forms, saves files, and drives the legacy app nobody will replace.

hero.command: uia-agent run --app Notepad "type a haiku and save as poem.txt"

title.zh: 不用写 selector，也不用记坐标

body.zh: 老软件没有 API，传统自动化只能靠人写死 selector 或录坐标，界面一改就全废。它像人一样看屏幕——认得每个按钮和输入框，界面变了它也找得到，不用你维护脚本。
body.en: Legacy apps have no API, so traditional automation means hand-writing selectors or recording coordinates that break the moment the UI changes. It reads the screen like a human — recognizing every button and field, so when the UI shifts it still finds them. No script maintenance.

chips: › 像人一样认得每个按钮

title.zh: 点的是真按钮，存的是真文件
title.en: Real clicks on real buttons, real saved files

body.zh: 每一步都落在正在运行的软件上——点的是真实的按钮，填的是真实的输入框，存的是真实的文件，不是截图模拟。一句话目标进去，它一步步点、填、存，直到把事做完。
body.en: Every step lands on the running app — it clicks the real button, fills the real field, saves the real file, not a screenshot mock. State the goal in one sentence; it clicks, fills, and saves its way to done.

chips: › 真实点击 / 输入 / 保存

title.zh: 接进你现有的 AI 工作流
title.en: Plug into your existing AI workflow

body.zh: 你已经有一套 AI 助手或 agent 框架，不想为桌面软件再搭一套。把桌面软件变成一个可调用的工具，你现有的工作流直接驱动它，不用胶水代码，也不用换技术栈。
body.en: You already have an AI assistant or agent framework — you don't want to rebuild a stack just for desktop apps. Turn the desktop app into a callable tool your existing workflow drives directly, no glue code, no stack swap.

chips: › 桌面软件变成可调用工具

title.zh: 读不到按钮就读屏幕，还敢公开成功率
title.en: If it can't read a button, it reads the screen — and it publishes the hit-rate

body.zh: 更老的软件自己画控件，界面上一个可点的东西都没有——别的工具直接放弃。它会退回截屏 + 识图，按文字找到最可能的位置点下去。更难得的是：它公开每个软件的真实成功率，跌破 40% 就自己宣布停项目，不粉饰。
body.en: Older apps paint their own controls, so the screen has nothing clickable — other tools just give up. This one falls back to a screenshot + OCR, finds the most likely spot by text, and clicks it. Rarer still: it publishes the real hit-rate per app, and if it drops below 40% it kills the project itself — no spin.

headline.zh: 给那些没人愿意改的桌面软件，一条出路
headline.en: A way out for the desktop software no one will fix

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、自带 API key。没有云端、不上报数据、没有付费墙——就在你自己有人值守的 Windows 上跑。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, bring your own API key. No cloud, no telemetry, no paywall — runs on your own attended Windows desktop.

tag.zh: 让 LLM 替你点那些没人愿意改的老 Windows 桌面软件的开源工具
tag.en: The open-source tool that lets an LLM drive the legacy Windows desktop apps no one will fix
